sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36609" key="e(cakontamoiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξᾰκοντᾰμοιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arc of sixty degrees,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope> </bibl> cod.</sense> </entryFree>
